title: Semi-Realistic Moon
description: Makes Minecraft's moon look more like the real Moon, and fixes the bad astronomy.
body:
Changes the Moon texture to look like a square version of the Moon in real life, while keeping a low-ish resolution to fit with vanilla.

This version also **rotates the texture** and **fixes the phases** so it is physically correct. It will probably look weird to you at first, but this **_is not an error_**. It looks best with shaders that have sun/moon angle (Set the angle to negative [your lattitude] in your shader settings).

A version with the same phases/rotation as vanilla is [available here.](https://modrinth.com/project/semi-realistic-moon-vp)

![.gif of the phases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/333a9376676b971f567afc09568f12155db1b98e.gif)

Should be compatible with all versions going forward and back, unless Mojang messes with the folder structure.
